that's settlement.

The third bucket is what we call high-opportunity industries.
And this is our term.
It's not an industry term.
So we don't want to go out.
We use it because the reason why we use it is these industries are what most organizations consider high-risk.
Meaning there's a high risk that people are going to try to use their payment channels to commit fraud.
Or they're going to see a lot of chargebacks.
So chargeback is when I buy something with my credit card and then call my bank and dispute the charge.
Merchants hate that because they lose the product and the money.
But the card networks like Visa will actually cancel you if you have too many.
So it's considered a risk.

So the companies that fall into these buckets are usually things like online gambling, adult, digital goods, anything you buy that's not a physical product because it's really easy for somebody to dispute a charge if they buy like an online course instead of something physical.
But things like CBD, cryptocurrency, online travel is a huge one here actually.
Just because like travel is so expensive and things can get canceled at the last minute.
So all of those things kind of fit into what we call this high opportunity bucket.
We say it's high opportunity opportunity because...
We're a big organization.
We've got a lot of low-risk merchants, so we can handle high-risk merchants also, because we have those low-risk merchants to balance out the fraud risks and the chargeback risks.
And we are really good at doing the background checks to validate these businesses, make sure that they're legit, and onboard them onto the platform.
So high opportunity is kind of our way of saying, like, hey, we value your business.
We want to bring you on the platform.
